hero.title: Powerful AI Features
hero.description: Discover the comprehensive suite of AI-powered tools that transform corporate communications, investor relations, and stakeholder engagement.

main_features.title: Smart Analytics Dashboard
main_features.description: Get real-time insights into market sentiment, media coverage, and investor engagement with our AI-powered predictive analytics platform.

features.description: Track how your company is perceived across news, social media, and financial platforms

features.title: Predictive Analytics
features.description: AI algorithms predict market reactions and optimal communication timing

features.title: Custom KPI Tracking
features.description: Monitor metrics that matter most to your stakeholders and industry

main_features.title: AI Content Generation
main_features.description: Generate compelling press releases, investor updates, and corporate communications tailored to your brand voice and target audience.

features.title: Brand Voice Consistency
features.description: AI learns your company's tone and messaging style for consistent communications

features.title: Multi-Format Content
features.description: Generate press releases, social posts, investor letters, and more

features.title: Compliance Ready
features.description: Built-in compliance checks for regulatory requirements and industry standards

main_features.title: Stakeholder Management
main_features.description: Intelligent CRM for investors, analysts, media contacts, and other key stakeholders with automated engagement tracking and personalized outreach.

features.title: Automated Contact Management
features.description: AI categorizes and prioritizes stakeholders based on influence and engagement

features.title: Engagement Tracking
features.description: Monitor interaction history and optimize communication frequency

features.title: Personalized Outreach
features.description: AI customizes messages based on stakeholder preferences and history

main_features.title: Strategic Insights
main_features.description: AI-driven recommendations for timing, messaging, and channel optimization to maximize impact and reach across all your communications.

features.title: Timing Optimization
features.description: AI analyzes market patterns to recommend optimal announcement timing

features.title: Channel Selection
features.description: Identify the most effective communication channels for your audience

features.title: Message Testing

additional_features.title: More Powerful Features
additional_features.description: Explore additional AI-powered capabilities that make AmplifiX the complete solution for corporate communications.

items.title: Compliance Monitoring
